Name: Family Atomics
Description: After the first game turn, play after the storm movement is calculated, but before the storm is moved, but only if you have one or more forces on the Shield Wall or a territory adjacent to the Shield Wall with no storm between your sector and the Wall. All forces on the Shield Wall are destroyed. Place the Destroyed Shield Wall token on the Shield Wall as a reminder. The Imperial Basin, Arrakeen and Carthag are no longer protected from the Storm for the rest of the game.

Name: Hajr
Description: Play during Movement Phase. The forces you move may be a group you've already moved this phase or another group. The forces you move make a second on-planet force movement subject to normal movement rules.

Name: Karama
Description: After game setup and factions have completed their At Start actions, use this card to stop one use of a faction advantage (including alliance abilities) when a player attempts to use it. When used on faction advantages during a battle this must be played before Battle Plans are revealed. Or, this card may be used to do either of these things when appropriate: Purchase a shipment of forces onto the planet at Guild rates. (1 normal) paid to the Spice Bank, or Bid more spice than you have (without revealing this card) and purchase a Treachery Card without paying spice for it (cannot be used if your hand is full).

Name: Tleilaxu Ghola
Description: Play at any time to gain an extra revival. You may immediately revive 1 of your leaders regardless of how many leaders you have in the tanks or up to 5 of your forces from the Tleilaxu Tanks to your reserves at no cost in spice. You still get your normal revivals.

Name: Truthtrance
Description: Publicly ask one other player a single yes/no question about the game that must be answered publicly. The game pauses until an answer is given. The player must answer yes or no truthfully.

Name: Weather Control
Description: After the first game turn, play during the Storm Phase before the Storm Marker is moved. When you play this card, you control the storm this phase and may move it from 0 to 10 sectors in a counter-clockwise direction.
